---
name: New skill proposal
about: Pitch a skill before you build it
title: "[SKILL] "
labels: new-skill
---

## What problem does this skill solve?

A real assignment, exam prep situation, or class workflow you've actually had.

## What would the skill do?

In one paragraph, walk through what happens when someone triggers it.

## Proposed category

Which folder under `skills/` does this belong in? If none fit, propose a new one and say why.

## Trigger phrases

What would a student say to invoke this? List 3-5 phrases.

## Does it need Claude-specific features?

Most skills don't. But if yours genuinely needs sub-agents, filesystem tools, code execution, or other Claude-only features, say so here. If unsure, default to "no, this is plain instructions."

## Why does this need to be a skill rather than just a good prompt?

Skills are worth the overhead when something is reusable, multi-step, or needs consistent structure. If this is a one-off, it might just be a prompt.

## Anything similar already in the repo?

Quick check: is there an existing skill that already covers this or could be extended?
